TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Rumen Radev ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Rumen Radev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Bulgaria ta' misuw hya' ga Rumen Radev, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rumen ra*e* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, rumen ra*e*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤ul…£aria ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a rumen ra*e*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Rumen Radev ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Rumen Radev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Bulgaria ta' misuw hya' ga Rumen Radev, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rumen ra*e* rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj *, rumen ra*e*, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤ul…£aria ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a rumen ra*e*, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
